species_profile.official_flavor_text: A powerful Pokemon that can split huge boulders with ease. Dislikes associating with others and chooses to live quietly deep within the mountains, playing with the snow.

label.appearance_description: Abomasnow PokeAPI profile: official genus: Frost Tree Pokemon; official Pokedex note (legends-arceus): A powerful Pokemon that can split huge boulders with ease. species_profile.official_flavor_text: Spends 18 hours of the day sleeping. Even while asleep, Abra can control its psychic powers - should danger approach, the Pokemon will simply teleport away.
